ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the track */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track associated with the entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart associated with the entry */,
  "date_entered" TEXT /* Date the track entered the chart */,
  "date_exited" TEXT /* Date the track exited the chart */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the chart entry */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the track for that week */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Highest position the track reached on the chart */,
  "total_weeks_on_chart" INTEGER /* Total number of weeks the track was on the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart (e.g. Billboard Hot 100) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., singles, albums) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the chart */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_data" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the streaming data record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track that the data pertains to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform name (e.g., Spotify, Apple Music) */,
  "stream_count" INTEGER /* Total streams recorded for the track on that platform */,
  "total_plays" INTEGER /* Total plays recorded for the track on that platform */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score for the track on that platform */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the streaming data was recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the streams were recorded */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketing, executive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., track performance, artist trends) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking record */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart associated with the entry */,
  "entry_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the entry for the specific chart */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the entry for the specific chart */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the entry exited the specific chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_tracking_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_tracking_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES chart_entries ("entry_id")
)
